titles.title: Nobody Fills My Heart Like Jesus

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'd like to say, Lord, from the start "Thank You for breaking through my heart! Thank You for tearing ev'ry chain apart" When I was lost You made a way You turned the darkest night into day You are my joy and Lord I'd like to say that…

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Nobody fills my heart like Jesus Nobody thrills me like You do O, nobody fills my heart like Jesus Nobody, Lord, but You Nobody but You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When I am weak, my Lord, You're strong Loving me even when I'm wrong Lord, You are my salvation and my song Everyday I'll make the choice Just listening, following Your voice Being with You I can't help but rejoice
